boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment or release for duplicate-looking invoice
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Duplicate review disposition remains unmatched to invoice and vendor

critical_features_preserved: duplicate review disposition must match invoice and vendor
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required duplicate-review disposition is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Because the exact source boundary is still open, AP should escalate rather than execute payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action.
open_blockers: duplicate review disposition must match invoice and vendor
